# messaging corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Slack ===
# expect: Slack User Token
# expect: Slack Workflow Token
# expect: Slack Configuration Access Token
# expect: Slack Configuration Refresh Token
# expect: Slack Legacy Token
# expect: Slack Legacy Workspace Token
# expect: Slack Session Cookie Token
User xoxp-1234567890-0987654321-1122334455-0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef here.
Workflow xwfp-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
ConfigAccess xoxe.xoxb-1-AAAAAAAAAAAA here.
ConfigRefresh xoxe-1-AAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Legacy xoxs-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Workspace xoxa-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Cookie xoxc-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.

# === Discord / Teams ===
# expect: Discord Webhook URL
# expect: Microsoft Teams Webhook URL
Hook https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123456789/AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Teams https://example.webhook.office.com/webhookb2/0123abcd-0000@4567ef00-1111/IncomingWebhook/0123456789abcdef/2222aaaa-3333 here.

# === Twilio ===
# expect: Twilio Account SID
Sid ACa1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6 here.

# === SendGrid / Mailgun ===
# expect: SendGrid API Key
# expect: Mailgun Private API Key
# expect: Mailgun Public Validation Key
Sg SG.AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA.AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Mg key-0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef here.
Pub pubkey-0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef here.

# === Mailchimp / Brevo / Resend ===
# expect: Mailchimp API Key
# expect: Brevo API Key
# expect: Resend API Key
Mc 0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef-us10 here.
Brevo xkeysib-0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Resend re_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.

# === Meta / WhatsApp ===
# expect: WhatsApp Business Cloud API Token
# expect: Meta Graph API Page Access Token
Wa EAABBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB here.
Page EAAMAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.

# === Plivo / Pushbullet ===
# expect: Plivo Auth ID
# expect: Pushbullet Access Token
Plivo MAABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQR here.
Pb o.0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef here.

# === Project tools ===
# expect: Linear API Key
# expect: Notion API Token
# expect: Notion Internal Integration Token (legacy)
# expect: Intercom API Token
# expect: Asana Personal Access Token
Lin lin_api_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Notion ntn_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
NotionLegacy secret_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Intercom dG9rOg==AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Asana 1/12345:0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef here.

# === Telnyx (Block 3c) ===
# expect: Telnyx API Key
KEYAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
